latest_version: v0.5.15 local share launcher v3 with EXE
notes: Includes the compiled Start Development System.exe launcher in the downloadable local app package.
Shows a progress bar and plain-language status updates instead of raw command output.
Keeps Start Development System.cmd as a fallback launcher.
Keeps the local-first workflow for Markdown, backups, CalendarExports, and GoogleTasksExports.
